name: vertex-sentinel
description: Verifiable risk-management layer for autonomous AI trading agents. EIP-712 signed TradeIntents, on-chain guardrails, and fail-closed execution.

scripts.start: npm run generate:types && NODE_OPTIONS='--import tsx --no-warnings' npx ts-node src/logic/agent_brain.ts
scripts.test: NODE_ENV=test NODE_OPTIONS='--import tsx --no-warnings' npx hardhat test test/RiskRouter.test.ts test/contracts/*.test.ts && NODE_ENV=test NODE_OPTIONS='--import tsx --no-warnings' npx mocha test/**/*.test.ts --exclude 'test/RiskRouter.test.ts' --exclude 'test/contracts/*.test.ts' --exit
scripts.demo: NODE_OPTIONS='--import tsx --no-warnings' npx hardhat run scripts/demo_flow.ts --network hardhat
scripts.register: NODE_OPTIONS='--import tsx --no-warnings' npx hardhat run scripts/deploy_sepolia.ts --network sepolia
scripts.onboard:sepolia: NODE_OPTIONS='--import tsx --no-warnings' npx hardhat run scripts/deploy_sepolia.ts --network sepolia
scripts.hackathon:submit: NETWORK=sepolia NODE_OPTIONS='--import tsx --no-warnings' npx hardhat run scripts/hackathon_submit.ts --network sepolia

author: VertexAgents <info.vertexagents@gmail.com>
